title: Fiery Roasted Ethiopian Beef Tibs
description: A spicy and flavorful Ethiopian dish made with roasted beef, hot beef stock, and traditional spices, served in a ceramic tagine.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together berbere spice, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Heat the vegetable oil in the ceramic tagine over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion to the tagine and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the tagine and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef strips to the tagine and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the hot beef stock to the tagine and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Serve the beef tibs hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
